role: Top-center corpus-search HUD that creates and filters ForagerShape circles on the tldraw canvas.
capabilities: Minimizable top-center search bar with header toggle
Fetch embeddable spaces from /api/cognition_info with history/repo fallback and surfaced info note
Explicit corpus query submission via button or Enter (no keystroke search)
Render query hits as ForagerShape circles using placeForagerHits
Loud status rendering for errors, empty results, and backend notes via EmptyState/info banner
Dynamic facet chips derived from live forager shapes' kind/session fields
Toggle chips to hide non-matching circles (opacity 0 + collapsed geometry + deselect)
Clear all forager-type shapes while leaving graph nodes untouched
Indicate address of the single selected forager shape through AppContext
substance_why: It implements the full search-to-shapes flow, live chip filtering, clear, selection indication, and loud empty/error states with real API calls and editor mutations.
interactions_present: Click header to minimize/expand the bar
Type query and select search space
Press Enter or click search button to submit query
Click a kind/session chip to toggle filter focus
Click clear-circles button to remove all forager shapes
Select a single forager circle on the canvas to indicate its address
interactions_missing: No request cancellation/abort for in-flight corpus queries
No mobile breakpoint hide logic in this file despite the comment
No retry or refresh for the spaces list after registry failure
No loading state for the spaces dropdown
No way to adjust result count (fixed k=16)
No separate 'clear filters only' action without removing shapes
performance_risks: applyFilters calls editor.updateShapes over every forager shape on each chip toggle
No AbortController or request deduplication for search; rapid submissions can race
Stale search response could set state after unmount/no cleanup
Chip counts and shape list are recomputed each render without memoization
Fixed k=16 may under/over-fetch for large viewports
reuse_why: The forager interaction model and state semantics are complete and should be preserved, but the imperative editor updates and UI shell should be refactored into the new component architecture.
decomposition_hints: Extract space discovery and corpus query into data hooks/services
Extract chip filter state and applyFilters imperative logic into a reusable hook
Separate ForagerShape placement/hiding geometry operations from the React UI
Extract single-selection indication side effect into a selection hook
Make the .hud/.rhm card shell a shared layout primitive
